tasks.label: api-new-user-verify
tasks.command: $u='walkthrough_20260401190232'; $p=@{ username=$u; password='Passw0rd!' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $p; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'new user login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $me=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me' -Headers $headers; [pscustomobject]@{ loginCode=$login.code; meCode=$me.code; username=$me.data.user.username; roleCode=$me.data.user.roleCode; companyId=$me.data.user.companyId; accountStatus=$me.data.user.accountStatus } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-pending-user-status-check
tasks.command: $admin=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $admin; $token=$login.data.token; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $list=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/list' -Headers $headers; $target=$list.data | Where-Object { $_.username -eq 'walkthrough_20260401190232' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { throw 'user not found in list' }; [pscustomobject]@{ code=$list.code; username=$target.username; accountStatus=$target.accountStatus; companyId=$target.companyId; roleId=$target.roleId } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-approve-new-user
tasks.command: $u='walkthrough_20260401190232'; $admin=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $admin; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'admin login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $list=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/list' -Headers $headers; $target=$list.data | Where-Object { $_.username -eq $u } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { throw 'user not found in list' }; $approveBody=@{ id=$target.id } | ConvertTo-Json; $approve=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/user/approve' -Headers $headers -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $approveBody; [pscustomobject]@{ approveCode=$approve.code; approveMsg=$approve.msg; username=$target.username; userId=$target.id } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-new-user-login-after-approve
tasks.command: $u='walkthrough_20260401190232'; $p=@{ username=$u; password='Passw0rd!' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $p; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw ('new user login failed code=' + $login.code) }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $me=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me' -Headers $headers; [pscustomobject]@{ loginCode=$login.code; meCode=$me.code; username=$me.data.user.username; accountStatus=$me.data.user.accountStatus; roleCode=$me.data.user.roleCode; companyId=$me.data.user.companyId } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: debug-hash-mismatch-ids
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,c.current_hash,
           LOWER(SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|',
                COALESCE(CAST(c.company_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(c.audit_log_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(l.user_id AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(l.operation, ''),
                COALESCE(CAST(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(l.operation_time, '+08:00', @@session.time_zone))) * 1000 AS CHAR), ''),
                COALESCE(l.input_overview, ''),
                COALESCE(l.output_overview, ''),
                COALESCE(l.result, ''),
                COALESCE(c.prev_hash, '')
           ), 256)) AS expected_current_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c JOIN audit_log l ON l.id=c.audit_log_id
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT id, company_id, expected_current_hash, current_hash
FROM chain
WHERE current_hash <> expected_current_hash
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 20;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: debug-hash-prev-mismatch-count
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,COALESCE(c.prev_hash,'') AS prev_hash,
           COALESCE(LAG(c.current_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY c.company_id ORDER BY c.id), '') AS expected_prev_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN prev_hash<>expected_prev_hash THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prev_mismatch_count,
  COUNT(1) AS total
FROM chain;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: debug-chain-true-mismatch-count
tasks.command:
$sql=@'
WITH chain AS (
    SELECT c.id,c.company_id,
           COALESCE(c.prev_hash,'') AS prev_hash,
           COALESCE(c.current_hash,'') AS current_hash,
           COALESCE(LAG(c.current_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY c.company_id ORDER BY c.id), '') AS expected_prev_hash,
           LOWER(SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|',
               COALESCE(CAST(c.company_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(c.audit_log_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(l.user_id AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(l.operation, ''),
               COALESCE(CAST(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(l.operation_time, '+08:00', @@session.time_zone))) * 1000 AS CHAR), ''),
               COALESCE(l.input_overview, ''),
               COALESCE(l.output_overview, ''),
               COALESCE(l.result, ''),
               COALESCE(c.prev_hash, '')
           ), 256)) AS expected_current_hash
    FROM audit_hash_chain c JOIN audit_log l ON l.id=c.audit_log_id
    WHERE c.company_id=1
)
SELECT COUNT(1) AS mismatches FROM chain WHERE prev_hash<>expected_prev_hash OR current_hash<>expected_current_hash;
'@; docker compose exec -T mysql mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --batch --raw --skip-column-names -uroot -proot aegisai -e $sql

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-check
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; [pscustomobject]@{ code=$res.code; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; recoveryMet=$res.data.detail.slo.recoveryMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy; mysql=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.mysql; redis=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.redis; thirdParty=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.thirdPartyApi; criticalHealthy=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.criticalHealthy; degradeReason=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.degradeReason } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-check-2
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $res.data.detail.componentProbe | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; recoveryMet=$res.data.detail.slo.recoveryMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: run-governance-readiness-evidence-final-2
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; .\scripts\run-governance-readiness-evidence.ps1 -RunRegressions

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); 1..5 | ForEach-Object { $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$_; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; infraAllHealthy=$res.data.detail.slo.infraAllHealthy; degradeReason=$res.data.detail.componentProbe.degradeReason } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breach=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -ne 'met' }).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs-v2
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if(-not $token){ throw 'login failed' }; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); 1..5 | ForEach-Object { $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$_; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breachCount=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -eq 'breach' } | Measure-Object).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: api-reliability-drill-stability-5runs-v2b
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $headers=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token); 'Content-Type'='application/json' }; $rows=@(); foreach($i in 1..5){ $body=@{ scenario='latency-and-failure-observe'; targetPath='/api/auth/registration-options'; injectPath='/api/non-existent-reliability-probe'; probeCount=4 } | ConvertTo-Json; $res=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/reliability/drill/run' -Headers $headers -Body $body; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ run=$i; sloStatus=$res.data.sloStatus; availabilityMet=$res.data.detail.slo.availabilityMet; latencyMet=$res.data.detail.slo.latencyMet; infraMet=$res.data.detail.slo.infraMet; p95=$res.data.detail.baselineProbe.p95LatencyMs } }; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; [pscustomobject]@{ total=5; breachCount=($rows | Where-Object { $_.sloStatus -eq 'breach' } | Measure-Object).Count } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: generate-immutable-manifest
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $runDir='docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224'; $files=@("$runDir/governance-readiness-evidence-summary.json","$runDir/reliability-drill.json","$runDir/audit-hash-chain-build.json","$runDir/audit-hash-chain-verify.json","docs/identity-issue-regression-summary.json","docs/account-duty-segregation-summary.json"); $hashes = foreach ($f in $files) { $h = Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $f; [pscustomobject]@{ path=$f; sha256=$h.Hash.ToLower() } }; $manifest=[pscustomobject]@{ generatedAtUtc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o'); runId='run-20260403-005224'; immutableManifestVersion='1.0'; items=$hashes }; $outPath="$runDir/immutable-handoff-manifest.json"; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "WROTE:$outPath"

tasks.label: generate-immutable-manifest-2
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $files=@('docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/governance-readiness-evidence-summary.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/reliability-drill.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/audit-hash-chain-build.json','docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/audit-hash-chain-verify.json','docs/identity-issue-regression-summary.json','docs/account-duty-segregation-summary.json'); $hashes = foreach ($f in $files) { $h = Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $f; [pscustomobject]@{ path=$f; sha256=$h.Hash.ToLower() } }; $manifest=[pscustomobject]@{ generatedAtUtc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o'); runId='run-20260403-005224'; immutableManifestVersion='1.0'; items=$hashes }; $outPath='docs/governance-readiness-evidence/run-20260403-005224/immutable-handoff-manifest.json'; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output ('WROTE:' + $outPath)

tasks.label: docker-ps-backend-only

tasks.label: api-home-fixes-smoke
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; if (-not $token) { throw 'login failed' }; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $bootstrap=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/monitor/bootstrap-trace' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ sampleSize=36 } | ConvertTo-Json); $verify=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/monitor/logs/verify-chain' -Headers $h; $adver=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/adversarial/run' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ scenario='real-threat-check'; rounds=10 } | ConvertTo-Json); $export=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/award/export' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ includePdf=$false; includeJson=$true } | ConvertTo-Json); [pscustomobject]@{ bootstrapLogs=$bootstrap.data.insertedAuditLogs; predicted=$bootstrap.data.predictedSamples; verifyRows=$verify.data.checkedRows; verifyPassed=$verify.data.passed; adverMode=$adver.data.mode; adverWinner=$adver.data.battle.winner; exportHasSig=[bool]$export.data.signature; exportWarning=$export.data.warning } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

tasks.label: api-bootstrap-dump
tasks.command: $payload=@{ username='admin'; password='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; $token=$login.data.token; $h=@{ Authorization=('Bearer ' + $token) }; $bootstrap=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/ai/monitor/bootstrap-trace' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body (@{ sampleSize=12 } | ConvertTo-Json); $bootstrap | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: backend-logs-tail-200
tasks.command: docker logs --tail 200 aegisai-backend

tasks.label: backend-logs-bootstrap-error
tasks.command: docker logs aegisai-backend 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "bootstrap-trace|AiCallController|NoClassDefFoundError|NullPointerException|BizException|batchPredict|Feign|ERROR" | Select-Object -Last 80 | Out-String

tasks.label: backend-logs-bootstrap-error-2
tasks.command: docker logs aegisai-backend 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'bootstrap-trace|AiCallController|NoClassDefFoundError|NullPointerException|BizException|batchPredict|Feign|ERROR' | Select-Object -Last 120 | Out-String

tasks.label: backend-logs-recent

tasks.label: backend-error-context
tasks.command: $logs = docker logs --since 5m aegisai-backend 2>&1; $m = $logs | Select-String -Pattern 'Unhandled exception|No static resource|Exception:' -Context 0,25; $m | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString(); $_.Context.PostContext } | Out-String
